primary_sources.title: Charge sheet filings against two senior military officers (named in court filings, charges public)
Auditor General's audits of LCS programme and other defence-procurement contracts
T4A issue 1962 referenced reporting (cartel-system 4,679 contracts, 26-firm structure)

charges: Section 23 MACC Act 2009 — abuse of position
Penal Code s.409 — criminal breach of trust
sentence_summary: Two senior military officers charged on defence-procurement allegations. Verdict pending. The case is one of the first to reach formal charging in the LCS / defence cartel constellation (programme cost RM11.22 billion over 15 years, zero criminal convictions until this case).
notes: Encoded as a single TrialVerdict event covering the charging event for the two generals. The wider cartel structure (4,679 contracts, 26 firms identified in audit) remains intact; the charging of two individuals does not dismantle it. T4A issue 1962 makes this structural point. The defendant_actor field is a placeholder pending creation of actor records for the two named officers in Phase 2b-iii. Reviewer should refine.
